summary: Iteration 3 testing completed successfully. All features requested by user are working: 3D Visualizer (fixed from R3F crash), Interview improvements (intro-first flow, auto-listen, camera proctoring, split IDE, speaking visualization), and navigation updates.
critical_code_review_comments: THREE.Clock deprecation warning in console - consider migrating to THREE.Timer in future
Camera access denied error is expected in Playwright (no camera device) - not a bug
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing test user and session
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 user-requested features verified working: 1) 3D Visualizer renders Array/LinkedList/BinaryTree/Stack/Graph with traverse animation, 2) Interview asks for introduction first then DSA, 3) Voice auto-capture (mic auto-listens after AI speaks), 4) AI speaking visualization (wave animation), 5) Split IDE visible during DSA round, 6) Camera proctoring UI elements present. Backend uses real Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM Key.

3d_visualizer.details: Pure Three.js implementation (no R3F). Array shows 8 boxes with values [5,3,8,1,9,2,7,4] and indices [0]-[7]. Binary Tree, Linked List, Stack, Graph all render correctly. Traverse animation highlights elements one by one.

interview_setup.details: Shows Alex Chen avatar, 4 round indicators (R1 Intro & DSA, R2 Projects & Core, R3 Managerial & SD, R4 HR Round), role input, JD textarea, proctoring notice, Start Interview button

interview_intro_first.details: AI introduces itself as Alex Chen and immediately asks candidate to introduce themselves (background, education, experience) before starting DSA questions

interview_screen_ui.details: AI avatar with speaking indicator, round indicators R1-R4, voice toggle, camera toggle, proctoring indicator, mic button, send button, message input all present

split_ide.details: Show IDE button appears during DSA round (R1). Clicking it shows split panel with code editor (Monaco), language selector (Python/JS/Java/C++), Submit button

speaking_visualization.details: SpeakingWave component shows animated bars when AI is speaking. Blue dot indicator on avatar during speech.

camera_proctoring.details: Camera toggle button present. Proctoring indicator shows 'Proctored' status. Tab switch detection logs events to /api/proctoring/event

problems_navigation.details: /problems page shows 15068 problems. Clicking row navigates to /problems/:id workspace

problem_workspace.details: 3-panel layout: Description (left), Code Editor with 22 languages (right top), AI Chatbot (right bottom). Run & Evaluate button works.

navbar_updated.details: Navbar shows: Dashboard, Interview, Problems, SQL Lab, 3D View, Resources
